sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 67:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 67:1
items.html: Because a vessel is not complete unless it has a yearning to receive. This is revealed only under two conditions: possible and intending (See answer 136).
